# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: microservice1
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice1
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: microservice2
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice2
  port: 8888
  proxyProtocol: GRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: sa-based-auth
spec:
  server:
    name: microservice1
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        names:
          - default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: port-based-auth
spec:
  server:
    name: microservice2
  client:
    networks:
      - '10.0.0.0/8'
      - '192.168.0.0/16'
